axeViolations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.28 (foreground color: #928a89, background color: #fcfcfa, font size: 7.5pt (10px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
